reviews.author: Christian Longobardi
reviews.text: One of the best massage I ever had until today in Singapore, after almost 11 years lived here.The lady name who did the massage her name is Mey from China( my best congrats :))

reviews.author: S.
reviews.text: Excellent massage — firm, thorough, and exactly what I needed. Great value for the quality of service.

reviews.author: Sasikumar Manirasan
reviews.text: Kelly & Eva were amazing. Kelly was a solid and warm front desk lady & Eva was very very strong, despite her small frame. She undid my pain and my knots and I felt better after showering. Awesome place, I will definitely come back again!
